headline: Base10, A VC Firm Co-Founded By Adeyemi Ajao, Raises $850M To Fund Early Stage AI-Focused Founders
summary: Base10 will continue investing in founders who are centering their companies around automation.

headline: OneSource Virtual Appoints Three New Board Members
summary: DALLAS, June 17, 2026--OneSource Virtual (OSV), a leading provider of HR and payments services for the Workday ecosystem, today named three new members to its Board of Directors: Amit Aghara, Matt Brandt, and Bala Janakiraman. Each brings deep experience in Workday, payments, or enterprise technology. Together they will help guide OSV into its next phase of growth.

headline: Embark and Commit Join Forces to Expand Finance and HR Technology Advisory Capabilities
summary: Embark, a leading finance, technology and business consulting firm, today announced its acquisition of Commit, a high-growth consulting firm specializing in the Workday ecosystem. This marks Embark's first transaction and significantly expands the firm's human capital management (HCM) advisory capabilities, strengthening its ability to optimize clients' HR and finance functions through deep Workday expertise.
